case_title: MICHAEL MARTINS VS. UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA MEDICAL CENTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARTINS, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA MEDICAL CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINS, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA MEDICAL CENTER THE COURT DID NOT FIND A VIOLATION OF THE FAIR DEBT COLLECTION ACT OR OTHER BASIS FOR LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-20-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA MEDICAL CENTER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA MEDICAL CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
